appDesc.message: Allow only the sites you choose and block navigation to everything else.

optSyncHint.message: Keep your allowlist in sync across the devices where you’re signed in to this browser. Off by default; whether blocking is on stays local to each device.

optBackupHint.message: Export all your settings and data to a JSON file, or import one to restore them on another machine. Importing replaces what’s on this device.

backupErrApp.message: That file isn’t a Blocker backup.

importBody.message: This replaces all of Blocker’s current settings and data on this device with the file’s contents. This can’t be undone.

lockedBody.message: Blocker is on. Stop blocking from the popup (you'll need your PIN) to change settings.

howBody.message: When blocking is on, any top-level navigation to a site that isn’t on your allowlist is sent to a block page. Allowing a site allows its whole base domain (every subdomain). Blocking needs permission to see the pages you navigate to; Blocker asks for it the first time you start.

needsAccess.message: Blocker needs permission to see the pages you visit.

pinSetSubtitle.message: You'll need this to stop blocking.

pinEnterSubtitle.message: Enter your unlock PIN to stop blocking.

optPinLengthHint.message: How many digits the unlock PIN has. Applies the next time you start blocking.

invalidDomain.message: Enter a valid domain, like example.com.

logHint.message: The most recent off-limits sites that were blocked (host and time). Kept locally on this device.

clearLogBody.message: Remove all recorded blocked attempts? This can’t be undone.

removeBody.message: Stop allowing $domain$? You can add it again later.

clearBody.message: Remove all $count$ allowed sites? This can’t be undone.

blockedBody.message: Blocker is on. Only the sites on your allowlist can be opened.
